reason: Strict self-evaluation: documentation is credited only as a baseline; missing executable enforcement, templates, CI, durable artifacts, or history-backed proof is deducted where applicable. Applied deductions: incomplete-merge-authority-boundary, missing-required-gates, missing-bot-safety-auditability.

evidence.summary: The agent guide forbids direct pushes to main.

deductions.reason: Direct main pushes are prohibited by AGENTS.md, but no branch protection or bot merge authority configuration is visible from repository evidence.

recommendation.summary: Document and enforce merge authority through GitHub branch protection when available.

deductions.reason: There is no bot auto-merge path, audit trail, or merge actor policy in this repo.

evidence.summary: Bot merge auditability is not defined.

recommendation.summary: Define merge actor and audit behavior if auto-merge is introduced.

deductions.reason: CI gates now exist, but branch protection/required check enforcement is not yet visible from repo evidence.

evidence.summary: CI runs the deterministic gate suite.

recommendation.summary: Enable branch protection required checks after confirming the workflow on GitHub.
